segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Good morning, North College Library. How can I help you?
segments.translation: 图书管理员：早晨好，北方学院图书馆。我怎样帮助您？

segments.text: MAN: I was wondering if it was possible to join the library.
segments.translation: 男人：我在想有没有可能加入图书馆。

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Are you a student at North College?
segments.translation: 图书管理员：你是北方学院的学生吗？

segments.text: MAN: No, I'm not, but someone told me it was possible to join, even if I wasn't.
segments.translation: 男人：不，我不是，但是有人告诉我即便我不是，也是可以加入的。

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: That's right, it is.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：是这样的。

segments.text: Are you over 18? That's our minimum joining age.
segments.translation: 你到18岁了吗？这是我们加入的最低年龄。

segments.text: MAN: Yes, I am.
segments.translation: 男人：是的，我是。

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: That's no problem then.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：那就应该没有问题了。

segments.text: MAN: Could you tell me what I have to do to join?
segments.translation: 男人：你可以告诉我我要做什么才能加入吗？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Well, you'll need to come in to the library and fill out some forms.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：那么，你需要到图书馆来填一些表。

segments.text: You'll also need to bring two passport photos with you.
segments.translation: 你还需要携带两张护照照片。

segments.text: We also need two documents for ID, so a driving licence would be fine.
segments.translation: 我们还需要两份证明身份的文件，所以驾照是可以的。

segments.text: MAN: I've got that and what else? A credit card?
segments.translation: 男人：这个我有，那其他的还有什么？信用卡？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: No, it needs to have your address on it.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：不行，上面必须有你的地址。

segments.text: MAN: Shall I bring a bank statement, would that do?
segments.translation: 男人：那我把银行对账单带来，可以吗？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: That'll be fine.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：没有问题。

segments.text: MAN: Good. Does it cost anything to join?
segments.translation: 男人：好的。加入需要收费吗？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Well, it's free for students here but otherwise it's £125 per year or £25 if you've got a current student card from another college.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：那对于这里的学生是免费的，否则是每年125镑，或者如果你有其他学校现在的学生证，是25镑。

segments.text: MAN: I was at Westerley College until last year but now I've got a job at Jefferson's steel factory.
segments.translation: 男人：我直到去年都还在维斯特里学院，但是现在我在杰弗逊钢铁厂找到了一份工作。

segments.text: Er, it's more expensive than I thought.
segments.translation: 呃，这比我想象的要贵多了。

segments.text: My local library is free.
segments.translation: 我当地的图书馆是免费的。

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: But you'll find they don't have the range of reference books or facilities which we buy for our students.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：但是你会发现他们没有我们为学生购置的那些参考书和设施。

segments.text: That's why you have to pay to be an external member.
segments.translation: 这就是为什么作为外来的成员，你不得不花钱。

segments.text: MAN: I see. How many books can I borrow?
segments.translation: 男人：明白了。我可以借多少书呢？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: We allow twelve items borrowed at any one time if you're a student, and that includes CDs, DVDs and videos.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：如果你是学生，我们允许一次借12件，这包括CD、DVD和录像。

segments.text: However, it's only eight items for members of the public.
segments.translation: 但是对于一般群众来说，一次只有8件。

segments.text: MAN: Fine. And how long can I have them for?
segments.translation: 男人：好的。还有我可以借多久？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Well, you can have both fiction and reference books for four weeks which isn't bad really.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：这个，小说和参考书都可以借阅四周，这其实并不是很糟糕。

segments.text: MAN: And what happens if I return them late?
segments.translation: 男人：如果我归还晚了会发生什么呢？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Like all libraries there's a fine system in place.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：就像所有的图书馆一样，我们有个罚款的体系。

segments.text: The minimum fine is £1.50 but it can be much higher for some items - up to £5 per week.
segments.translation: 最低罚款是1.50镑，但是对于有些书目会更高——每周最高到5镑。

segments.text: We'll give you a booklet with all the details when you join.
segments.translation: 当你加入时，我们会给你一个小手册，上面有所有的细节。

segments.text: You can always renew items if they're not required by anyone else by telephoning or logging on to our website.
segments.translation: 如果没有其他人需要，你随时可以通过电话或登入我们的网站续借。

segments.text: MAN: What about the computers?
segments.translation: 男人：计算机呢？

segments.text: Can I use them free of charge?
segments.translation: 我可以免费使用吗？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: For college students it's free, but for external members like yourself, the first hour is free and then we make a nominal charge of £1 per hour thereafter.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：对学院的学生是免费的，但是对于像您这样的外部人员，第一个小时免费，之后我们会按每小时一镑进行象征性收费。

segments.text: MAN: Do I have to book in advance for them?
segments.translation: 男人：我需要提前预定电脑吗？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Oh, yes, it's advisable.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：哦是的，这样比较明智。

segments.text: Most people tend to book twenty-four hours in advance although sometimes you can get one with only six hours' notice.
segments.translation: 大部分人会提前24小时预订，尽管有的时候你能提前6小时找到个电脑。

segments.text: However, the earliest you can book a computer is forty-eight hours before you need it, and you can only book one hour at a time.
segments.translation: 但是，在需要用之前你最早可以提前48小时预订电脑。一次你只能预订一个小时的。

segments.text: If no-one else has booked the computer out, then you may be able to have another hour if you want.
segments.translation: 如果没有其他人预订，之后如果你需要，你也许可以再继续用一个小时。

segments.text: We have a wide range of databases, so the computers are in great demand.
segments.translation: 我们有着各类的数据库，所以电脑的需求量很大。

segments.text: MAN: I'm thinking of doing some writing and I might need to access national newspapers.
segments.translation: 男人：我在考虑做一些写作，我可能需要国家级报纸的链接。

segments.text: Do you have them on these databases?
segments.translation: 你们的数据库里有这些吗？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: We do indeed. We've got all the big nationals, The Guardian and The Observer, The Independent and The Times and Sunday Times.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：我们的确有。我们有所有大型的国家报纸，《卫报》、《观察家》、《独立报》、《时代》、《时代周日刊》。

segments.text: We've also got all the local papers and a wide selection of magazines.
segments.translation: 我们还有所有的本地报纸和各种杂志。

segments.text: MAN: Excellent. I assume you have photocopying facilities?
segments.translation: 男人：太棒了。我猜你们也有复印设施？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Of course. 5p a sheet for both A4 and A3 black-and-white copies and 40p a sheet for colour.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：当然。A4和A3尺寸黑白的5便士一张，彩色的40便士。

segments.text: You can get a card from the counter here - it doesn't take coins.
segments.translation: 你可以从这边的柜台拿一张卡，它不接受硬币。

segments.text: MAN: OK. Oh by the way, another thing I was wondering about was if you ran any writing classes through the library?
segments.translation: 男人：好的。哦顺便问一下，另一个我在考虑的事情是你们是否有任何在图书馆讲授的写作课？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: We do, but you'll have to speak to John Grantingham about that.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：我们有的，但是你必须去找约翰葛兰汀汉姆了解这个。

segments.text: He's our resident author.
segments.translation: 他是我们的常驻作家。

segments.text: He runs the creative writing classes.
segments.translation: 他在这里运作创意写作课。

segments.text: MAN: John ... Grant .... Could you spell that for me please?
segments.translation: 男人：约翰…… 葛兰汀…… 您能帮我拼一下吗？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Certainly. G - R - A - N - T - I - N - G - H - A - M.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：当然。G - R - A - N - T - I - N - G - H - A – M。

segments.text: MAN: Are the classes here at the library?
segments.translation: 男人：课程是在图书馆吗？

segments.text: LIBRARIAN: Yes - he's here on Thursday evenings, oh no sorry, Friday - he's just changed it.
segments.translation: 图书管理员：是的——他周四晚上在，哦不，抱歉，周五——他刚刚改了。

segments.text: You can contact him by emailing the library.
segments.translation: 你可以通过给图书馆发电邮来联系他。

segments.text: MAN: Okay. Right, well that's about all I need to know. Thank you.
segments.translation: 男人：好的。这差不多就是所有我想知道的了。谢谢。

segments.text: I'll be along later this week to join. Thanks. Bye.
segments.translation: 我在这周晚些时候会来加入的。谢谢。再见。
